title: Iqbal Verse #510 — Allama Iqbal Urdu Shayari
content:
اَہرام کی عظمت سے نگُوں سار ہیں افلاک
کس ہاتھ نے کھینچی اَبدِیّت کی یہ تصویر!

— Translation —
The grandeur of these pyramids puts lofty heavens to disgrace
What hand did build, design and frame, they seem attired in lasting grace?
meaning: "Iqbal Verse #510" by Allama Iqbal is a spiritual urdu poem consisting of 6 lines. This Urdu verse by Allama Iqbal showcases the rich tradition of South Asian poetry. The poet masterfully employs Urdu literary conventions to convey profound emotional depth. Beginning with "اَہرام کی عظمت سے نگُوں سار ہیں افلاک کس ہاتھ نے کھینچی اَبدِیّت کی یہ تصویر!...", this piece explores themes of spiritual through vivid imagery and emotional resonance. The work invites contemplation on the deeper currents of life, love, and the human condition. Allama Iqbal's celebrated body of poetry continues to inspire readers across generations and cultures, and this particular work stands as a powerful example of their artistic vision.
